descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties and processing behavior

quality.loss_reason: collapses full distribution to single statistic
quality.notes: mean, median, mode yield different values

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic angular differences across grain boundaries
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary energy and material transport

quality.truncation_error: spatial correlations and axis information lost

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.rationale: influences anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

quality.truncation_error: texture type and symmetry information lost
quality.notes: different textures can share same intensity

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates processing history and directional properties

quality.truncation_error: grain orientation and shape distribution lost
quality.notes: axis definition and statistical measure unspecified

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: population fractions of special boundary types
descriptors.rationale: special boundaries resist cracking and corrosion

quality.loss_reason: categorizes continuous misorientation into discrete types
